tiers.definition: Cross-checked against OEM documentation and accepted by reviewer.
Promoted into the canonical knowledge core; authoritative for downstream consumers.
Extracted from OCR of OEM manuals; awaits semantic reconciliation.
Derived by semantic interpretation; supported by multiple evidences but not OEM-confirmed.
Single-source or weakly evidenced; flagged for review.
Superseded by a newer artifact; retained for lineage only.
Known gap; tracked in the gaps register pending evidence.
Migration in progress between two schema versions or two storage layouts.
